focus_tree = {
    id = preset_smoke_tree
    focus = {
        id = ROOT
        x = 0
        y = 0
        icon = {
            trigger = {
                has_government = democratic
            }
            value = GFX_goal_generic_construct_civilian
        }
        offset = {
            x = 1
            y = 0
            trigger = {
                has_stability > 0.5
            }
        }
    }
    focus = {
        id = CHILD
        x = 1
        y = 1
    }
}
